channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] Codex usage up >10x in 6 months to 7M users, +1M in the past ~day; did Codex overtake Claude Code??
item.description: [AINews] Codex usage up >10x in 6 months to 7M users, +1M in the past ~day; did Codex overtake Claude Code??

item.title: [Hacker News] Claude is just Mr. Meeseeks
item.description: Claude is just Mr. Meeseeks

item.title: [Hacker News] Samsung will delete your health data if you don't let them use it to train AI
item.description: Samsung will delete your health data if you don't let them use it to train AI

item.title: [Hacker News] Telegram's t.me domain has been suspended
item.description: Telegram's t.me domain has been suspended

item.title: [Anthropic] How Claude's values vary by model and language
item.description: How Claude's values vary by model and language

item.title: [Hacker News] Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor
item.description: Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor

item.title: [Anthropic] Claude for Creative Work
item.description: Claude for Creative Work

item.title: [Anthropic] Anthropic Sydney office
item.description: Anthropic Sydney office

item.title: [Anthropic] Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
item.description: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs

item.title: [Hacker News] Show HN: Clawk – Give coding agents a disposable Linux VM, not your laptop
item.description: Show HN: Clawk – Give coding agents a disposable Linux VM, not your laptop

item.title: [Anthropic] How Claude Performs on Robotics Tasks
item.description: How Claude Performs on Robotics Tasks

item.title: [Hacker News] Grok uploaded my user directory to xAI's servers
item.description: Grok uploaded my user directory to xAI's servers

item.title: [Hacker News] Grok CLI uploaded the whole home directory to GCS
item.description: Grok CLI uploaded the whole home directory to GCS

item.title: [Anthropic] A global workspace in language models
item.description: A global workspace in language models

item.title: [Hacker News] Show HN: DOM-docx – HTML to native, editable Word docs (MIT)
item.description: Show HN: DOM-docx – HTML to native, editable Word docs (MIT)

item.title: [GitHub Trending] moeru-ai/airi — 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
item.description: Self-hosted AI companion supporting real-time voice chat and playing Minecraft and Factorio, available on Web, macOS, and Windows.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Graphify-Labs/graphify — AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
item.description: Graphify converts code repositories, databases, and documentation into queryable knowledge graphs for AI coding assistants.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset — 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.
item.description: A 1,324-exercise fitness dataset with GIFs, thumbnails, muscle-group data, and multilingual instructions for the LogPress app.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/coreyhaines31 — Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.
item.description: Corey Haines offers marketing services including CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering for Claude Code and AI agents.

item.title: [Hacker News] Zig Creator Calls Spade a Spade, Anthropic Blows Smoke
item.description: Zig Creator Calls Spade a Spade, Anthropic Blows Smoke

item.title: [Hacker News] Interrail: 6,379Km and 13 Countries over 7 weeks
item.description: Interrail: 6,379Km and 13 Countries over 7 weeks

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] HALO: Hybrid Adaptive Latent Reasoning for Language Models
item.description: HALO improves frozen language models via selective token-level refinement, achieving stronger results than fixed baselines with less compute.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] An Emergent Mirage: Is Emergent Misalignment and Realignment Indeed a Robust Phenomenon?
item.description: Study questions robustness of emergent misalignment in language models, finding behavior highly sensitive to dataset characteristics and artifacts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AgentKGV: Agentic LLM-RAG Framework with Two-Stage Training for the Fact Verification of Knowledge Graphs
item.description: AgentKGV is an LLM-RAG framework using iterative query rewriting and two-stage training to verify knowledge graph facts more accurately while reducing computational costs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PRecG: Legal Precedent Retrieval with Graph Neural Networks and Rhetorical Role Segmentation
item.description: PRecG uses graph neural networks and rhetorical role segmentation to improve legal precedent retrieval by learning hierarchical document representations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Augmenting Fundamental Analysis with Large Language Models: A RAG-Based System for Generating Investor Briefs
item.description: RAG-based LLM system generates investor briefs from company reports and SEC filings; tested with individual investors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Complexity-Guided Component-wise Initialization for Language Model Pretraining
item.description: Researchers find pretrained language models share structured weight spectral patterns, but initialization schemes based on these patterns provide no performance improvement.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Letter Lemmatization: One-to-one and Banded RNNs for Reversing Character-Set Simplification and Abbreviation in Medieval Text
item.description: RNNs reverse character-set simplification and expand abbreviations in medieval texts, improving handwritten text recognition post-processing through letter lemmatization methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Creativity, honesty and designed forgetting emerge in small hyperbolic language models
item.description: Small hyperbolic language models detect sycophancy and confabulation, implementing exponential forgetting for trustworthy companion AI.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Automatic Thematic Indexing of Large Literary Corpora: A Machine Learning Approach to Voltaire's Complete Works
item.description: Researchers use machine learning, including fine-tuned LLMs, to automatically assign thematic index labels to Voltaire's literary works, achieving F1 scores up to 0.67.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Letting the Data Speak: Extracting Keywords from Crowdsourced Collections with AI
item.description: Study evaluates NLP methods for automated keyword extraction in crowdsourced collections; open-weight models outperform generative AI, though no single approach provides complete solution.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] WILDTRACE: Benchmarking Natural Evidence Trails in Long-Context Reasoning
item.description: WILDTRACE benchmark evaluates long-context reasoning using naturally occurring evidence trails from 214 real documents across 481 tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Towards Detecting Inconsistencies in End-to-end Generated TODs
item.description: Researchers propose a Constraint Satisfaction Problem method to detect inconsistencies and hallucinations in LLM-generated task-oriented dialogues.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DKCD: Domain Knowledge-Enhanced Causal Discovery from Unstructured Data
item.description: DKCD framework improves causal discovery from unstructured domain data by integrating domain knowledge to identify latent factors and ensure reliable annotations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Deceptive Grounding: Entity Attribution Failure in Clinical Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: Clinical RAG systems misattribute evidence to wrong entities despite passing automated checks; study finds 7.8% deceptive grounding rate in production systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs
item.description: Self-Guided Test-Time Training method improves long-context LLM accuracy by identifying relevant evidence spans before parameter adaptation, achieving up to 15% gains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Sovereign, Open-Source Foundation Model for German and English
item.description: Open-source Soofi S model for German and English matches dense 14-27B models using hybrid architecture with 3B active parameters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Test-Time Scaling for Small VLMs on Multilingual Visual MCQ
item.description: Test-time scaling improves small VLMs on multilingual visual MCQ; prompt format and token budget matter more than elaborate methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Normalisation-Based Likelihood Ratio Estimation for Forensic Authorship Verification
item.description: Square Root and Hapax Corrections enable forensic authorship verification without calibration models, achieving comparable performance with reduced data needs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FreyaTTS Technical Report
item.description: Freya-TTS, a tokenizer-free Turkish TTS model using flow-matching transformers, achieves 8% WER with real-time CPU inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Conceptual Networks for Cross-Linguistic Idiomatic Expressions:A Feature-Based Graph Approach
item.description: Researchers develop a graph-based framework using conceptual features to represent idiomatic expressions across eight languages, outperforming embedding methods in idiom detection and translation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Tokenizer Transplantation: Mitigating Autoregressive Collapse in Edge-Efficient Bengali ASR
item.description: Vocabulary transplantation replaces English-centric tokenizers with native-script alternatives to fix autoregressive collapse in lightweight Bengali speech recognition models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Toward Real-Time Sentence-Level Sign Language Translation
item.description: Researchers develop a real-time sentence-level sign language translation system using a hardware-aware streaming architecture that reduces response latency by 27%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Task-Specific Multimodal Question Answering Agents via Confidence Calibration and Incremental Reasoning for QANTA 2026
item.description: Researchers developed task-specific multimodal question answering agents with confidence calibration, achieving the highest QANTA 2026 leaderboard score of 0.402.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Unified Approach to Interpreting Knowledge Distillation for Large Language Models via Interactions
item.description: Study reveals knowledge distillation operates by sparsifying interactions in student models; proposes Complex Interaction Penalty to enhance performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Sticky Routing: Training MoE Models for Memory-Efficient Inference
item.description: StickyMoE training method reduces expert switching in MoE models by 60% with minimal perplexity loss for memory-efficient edge device inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Training, Reading, and Editing Legible Transformers
item.description: Legible transformers using crisp operators and variance floors achieve 78% feed-forward legibility while preventing training collapse of the crispness penalty.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Sensitivity-Aware Thresholding and Token Routing for Activation Sparsification in Large Language Models
item.description: Paper proposes sensitivity-aware activation thresholding and token routing to improve LLM inference efficiency-quality trade-offs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Phone Segmentation and Recognition through Phonological Activation Mapping
item.description: Phonological Activation Mapping leverages self-supervised speech models' latent phonetic structure for joint phone segmentation and recognition with minimal supervision.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] VTaMo: Video-Text Alignment Model for Sign Language Translation
item.description: VTaMo framework achieves state-of-the-art sign language translation through multi-level video-text alignment combining optimal transport and contrastive learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MedRealMM: A Real-World Multimodal Benchmark for Chinese Online Medical Consultation
item.description: MedRealMM benchmarks LLMs on 5,620 real Chinese multimodal medical consultations, finding frontier models underperform online physicians overall.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Unified Approach to Interpreting Knowledge Distillation for Large Language Models via Interactions
item.description: Researchers show knowledge distillation works by sparsifying interactions, proposing Complex Interaction Penalty loss to improve student model performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] iLENS: Interpretable LLM-Guided Mixture-of-Experts for Neuroimaging Survival Analysis
item.description: iLENS uses LLM-guided mixture-of-experts to predict Alzheimer's Disease conversion risk from neuroimaging data with interpretable clinical rationales.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Signed Symmetric Quantization for Few-Bit Integers
item.description: Signed symmetric quantization reduces few-bit quantization error by optimally assigning the extra negative representable value while maintaining symmetric quantization's efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sticky Routing: Training MoE Models for Memory-Efficient Inference
item.description: StickyMoE, a training method for MoE models, reduces expert switching by 60% with minimal perplexity loss, improving memory efficiency on edge devices.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reward Transport: Property Control in Flow Matching via Noise-Space Alignment
item.description: Reward Transport enables property-controlled molecular generation in flow matching by aligning noise-space coordinates with rewards via optimal transport at training time.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Director: Accelerating Distributed MoE Serving via Online Proactive Expert Placement
item.description: Director system uses prediction-driven online expert placement to reduce Mixture-of-Experts serving latency by 11-55%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LieBN: Batch Normalization over Lie Groups
item.description: LieBN provides a generalized batch normalization framework for manifold-valued data on Lie groups, tested across nine distinct geometries.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HERO: A Heterogeneity-Aware Benchmark Library for Federated Continual Learning
item.description: HERO benchmark library for federated continual learning decouples task splits, client data distribution, and task ordering to enable standardized evaluation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DaDaDa: A Dataset for Data Pricing in Data Marketplaces
item.description: New DaDaDa dataset of 16,147 data products enables machine learning models to establish pricing benchmarks across data marketplaces.
